title: Getting in touch with support
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I’m wondering if anybody knows the best way for me to get in touch with support. I’ve been trying to get in touch with them for a little while now through support form. 
Thanks for the help!

posts.author: Bastouri (Daniel Bastouri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m wondering if anybody knows the best way for me to get in touch with support. I’ve been trying to get in touch with them for a little while now through support form.

Thanks for the help!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bastouri - just send an email to support@monday.com you should get a response quickly that way.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: Bastouri (Daniel Bastouri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark, thank you, I’ll try the email this time instead of the form.

Cheers,

Daniel
